events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

events.name: epidemic
events.description: Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

governance.rationale: Let a LisPy program govern — transparent, deterministic.

meta_awareness.insight: Aura Kai whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Zeph Wind dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.
